_note: The fixed set of fixtures/selections EdgeLedger has a fair-probability estimate for right now. PRD/COMPLEXITY explicitly rule out inventing a new per-request prediction model in this build ('accountability is the gap, not model novelty') — so /api/edge only ever grades a selection it has model coverage for here; everything else honestly SKIPs with reason='no_model_coverage' rather than fabricating a number. model_prob values are the same heuristic used for the ported seed ledger (fixtures/picks.csv), NOT a live ML feed. See DEMO.md.
